message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
    LifeLineBorderColor Black
    LifeLineBackgroundColor LightGray
    ActorBorderColor Black
    ActorBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
}

participant "producer" as P
participant "consumer" as C
participant "broker" as B
participant "NameServer" as NS1
participant "NameServer" as NS2

box "NameServer 启动流程" #LightGray
    activate NS1
    note right of NS1: 1 启动 NameServer 服务器
    activate NS1
    note right of NS1: 2 启动监听
    note right of NS1: 监听 broker 链接\n监听 producer 链接\n监听 consumer 链接
    deactivate NS1
    note right of NS1: 3
    deactivate NS1
    note left of NS1: 4
end box

box "broker 启动流程" #LightGray
    activate B
    note right of B: 5 启动 broker 服务器
    activate B
    note right of B: 6 每个 broker 与 每个 NameServer 建立长链接
    activate NS1
    note left of B: 7
    deactivate NS1
    note left of B: 8
    deactivate B
    note right of B: 9 每 30 秒发送心跳
end box

box "producer 启动/发消息流程" #LightGray
    activate P
    note right of P: 10 启动
    activate P
    note right of P: 11 先与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
    activate NS1
    note left of P: 12
    deactivate NS1
    note right of P: 13 获取路由信息，获取 topic 与 broker queue 的对应关系
    activate NS1
    note left of P: 14
    deactivate NS1
    note left of P: 15
    note right of P: 16 每 30 秒更新一次路由信息
    note right of P: 17 发送消息
    activate P
    note right of P: 18 随机选择一个 queue，并发送消息
    activate B
    note left of P: 19
    deactivate B
    note left of P: 20
    deactivate P
end box

box "consumer 启动/pull消息流程" #LightGray
    activate C
    note right of C: 21 启动
    activate C
    note right of C: 22 与一台 NameServer 建立长链接
    activate NS1
    note left of C: 23
    deactivate NS1
    note right of C: 24 获取 topic 的路由信息
    activate NS1
    note left of C: 25
    deactivate NS1
    note right of C: 26 建立长链接并获取 queue
    activate B
    note left of C: 27
    deactivate B
    note left of C: 28
    deactivate C
    note right of C: 29 每 30 秒发送心跳，确保 broker 存活
    note right of C: 30 每 30 秒更新路由信息
    note right of C: 31 消息消费
    activate C
    note right of C: 32 拉取消息消费
    activate B
    note left of C: 33
    deactivate B
    note left of C: 34
    deactivate C
end box

@enduml
```
